title: SIBOMANA v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
text:
SIBOMANA v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RPAA 00209/2023/CA (Kanyange, P.J.,) 21
Gashyantare 2025]
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana – Ibimenyetso – Mu manza
nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri
kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale), ababuranyi bakaba barahawe
uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, urukiko nirwo rwemeza ko ibyo bimenyetso bishobora
kwemerwa.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uwitwa Mujawamariya Irene yareze Sibomana Aimable mu Bugenzacyaha
avuga ko yasambanyije umwana we w’umukobwa witwa U.N. w’imyaka 9 y’amavuko, maze
atangira gukurikiranwa.
Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Sibomana mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo
icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku bimenyetso birimo imvugo ya nyina wa U.N., ku
buhamya bwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique no kuri raporo ya muganga, bityo bumusabira guhanishwa
igifungo cya burundu. Uregwa yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko bamubeshyera
Urukiko rwasanze hari ibimenyetso bitandukanye byemeza ko Sibomana yakoze icyaha
akurikiranweho, hamwe na raporo ya muganga yerekana ko U.N yasambanyijwe kuko yagaragaje
ko akarangabusugi ke kaciwe mu gihe cya vuba (hymen tear flesh), maze rwemeza ko ibyo
bimenyetso bimuhamya icyaha akurikiranweho, bityo rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu.
Sibomana Aimable yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze, asaba
kugirwa umwere.
Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije ko ubujurire bwa Sibomana Aimable nta shingiro bufite kuko hari
bimenyetso byashingiweho n’Urukiko bigizwe n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya na raporo ya
muganga igaragaza ko umwana afite ibimenyetso bya vuba byo gusambanywa, ko
n’iby’amakimbirane avuga nta shingiro bifite.
Urukiko Rukuru rwasanze hari ibimenyetso bihamya ko Sibomana yakoze icyaha cyo gusambanya
umwana, rusanga ariko yagabanyirizwa igihano kuko nta bundi yigeze akurikiranwa, kandi akaba
yari akiri muto kuko yakoze icyaha afite imyaka 19, maze rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka cumi
n’itanu (15).
Sibomana yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, we n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije
ibimenyetso bimushinjura, bavuga ko DNA yagombaga gukorwa hakagaragazwa ko ari we
wabikoze, bavuga ko urukiko rwigangije n’amakimbirane yari afitanye n’abamurega, bavuga ko
Urukiko rwashingiye ku mvugo z’abatangabuhamya bavuguruzanya hagati yabo, maze
rumuhamya icyaha nta bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho byemeza ko ari we wasambanyije uwo
mwana.
Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko ntaho
Sibomana yasabye ko abatangabuhamya be babazwa ngo Urukiko rubyange, kandi ko atagaragaza

ibimenyetso by’amakimbirane avuga ko yari hagati y’imiryango yombi, ahubwo ko hari
ibimenyetso byashingiweho atabashije kuvuguruza byemeza ko yakoze icyaha akurikiranweho.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu
gihe bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale),
ababuranyi bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, urukiko nirwo rwemeza ko
ibyo bimenyetso bishobora kwemerwa.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko N° 15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo,
ingingo ya 119.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Urubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Ndayishimiye, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023;
Urubanza RPAA 00199/2025/CA, rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Umuhire Udahemuka n’undi,
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/10/2025;
Uurubanza RPAA 00056/2023/CA, rw’ Ubushinjacyaha na Uwanyagasani, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 29/09/2025;
Urubanza RPAA 010/09/CS rw’ Ubushinjacyaha na Nzajyibwami Emmanuel, rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 09/03/2012.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Uwitwa Mujawamariya Irene yareze Sibomana Aimable mu Bugenzacyaha ko
yasambanyije umwana we w’umukobwa witwa U.N.1 w'imyaka 9 y’amavuko, avuga ko ku
wa 07/04/2019 uwo mwana yaje arira kandi yari yavuye mu rugo agiye gutashya inkwi,
ababwira ko Sibomana n’undi bari kumwe baragiye ihene bamusambanyije, arebye ku
gitsina cy’umwana abona yakomeretse harimo kuvamo amaraso, abimenyesha abaturanyi
n’umunyabuzima bajyana umwana kwa muganga, Sibomana Aimable atangira
gukurikiranwa.
[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Sibomana Aimable mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye
rwa Gasabo icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku bimenyetso birimo imvugo
1 Yahawe iri zina kuko ari umwana

ya nyina wa U.N., ku buhamya bwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique no kuri raporo ya muganga,
bumusabira guhanishwa igifungo cya burundu.
[3] Sibomana Aimable yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko bamubeshyera kuko we yari
aragiye mu Igaraje, kandi U.N. we akaba avuga ko yasambanyirijwe mu ishyamba, ndetse
ko afite icyo apfa na nyina w’uwo mwana kuko yigeze gufungisha murumuna we nawe
amurega gusambanya uwo mwana akaza gufungurirwa kuri Polisi.
[4] Mu rubanza RP 00620/2019/TGI/GSBO rwaciwe ku wa 31/10/2019, Urukiko rwasanze
hari ibimenyetso byemeza ko Sibomana Aimable yakoze icyaha akurikiranweho birimo
imvugo ya nyina wa U.N. wasobanuye ko umwana we yagiye gutashya agaruka arira nta
nkwi azanye, avuga ko yasanze Sibomana n’undi muhungu mu ishyamba baragiye ihene
baramusambanya; raporo ya muganga yemeza ko U.N. yasambanyijwe kuko yagaragaje
ko akarangabusugi ke kaciwe mu gihe cya vuba (hymen tear flesh), kandi ko yakobotse mu
myanya ndangagitsina, n’ubuhamya bwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique wavuze ko ubwo yari
iwabo wa U.N. yamubonye aje arira, avuga ko Sibomana na Gikuri bamusanze mu
ishyamba yagiye gutashya bakamusambanya, barebye ku gitsina cye basanga
bamukomerekeje, rwemeza ko ibyo bimenyetso bimuhamya icyaha akurikiranweho,
rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu.
[5] Sibomana Aimable yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze, ko
ahubwo ari amatiku ya nyina w’uwo mwana ushaka kubatwara isambu, kuko yari yabanje
gufungisha murumuna we ariko baramufungura, abonye byanze aba ari we afungisha,
kandi ko batamujyanye kwa muganga ngo na we bamupime, asaba kugirwa umwere.
[6] Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije ko ubujurire bwa Sibomana Aimable nta shingiro bufite kuko
hari bimenyetso byashingiweho n’Urukiko bigizwe n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya na
raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko umwana afite ibimenyetso bya vuba byo gusambanywa,
ko n’iby’amakimbirane avuga nta shingiro bifite.
[7] Mu rubanza RPA 01901/2019/HC/KIG rwaciwe ku wa 13/01/2023, Urukiko Rukuru
rwasanze hari ibimenyetso bihamya ko Sibomana Aimable yakoze icyaha cyo gusambanya
umwana, birimo imvugo ya nyina w’uwo mwana wavuze ko yagiye gutashya agaruka nta
nkwi azanye arimo kurira amubwira ko yasanze Sibomana n’undi muhungu mu ishyamba
baragiye ihene baramusambanya, kandi nta kimenyetso Sibomana Aimable yashoboye
gutanga kibivuguruza, kuko n’ibyo avuga ko yari afite ibyo apfa na nyina w’uwo mwana,
Urukiko rwakoze iperereza rugasanga nta masano imiryango yombi ifitanye, bakaba
batanamenyeranye ku buryo iby’uko bashakaga kubatwara amasambu bitashoboka.
[8] Rwanashingiye ku kuba igihe cy’iperereza Urukiko rwakoze, uwo mwana yaravuze
ibyamubayeho adategwa, anavuga ko impamvu undi wari kumwe na Sibomana
atakurikiranwe ari uko we atamusambanyije, rushingira no ku buhamya bwa Nyiraguhirwa
Pacifique wavuze ko yari iwabo w'uwo mwana ubwo yazaga arira avuga ko Sibomana na
Gikuri bamusanze mu ishyamba aho yari yagiye gutashya bakamusambanya, bareba ku
gitsina cye bagasanga bamukomerekeje, na raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko U.N.
yasambanyijwe kuko ivuga ko akarangabusugi ke kavuyeho mu gihe cya vuba (hymen tear
flesh), no mu myanya ndangagitsina ye hakobotse. Rwasanze ariko yagabanyirizwa

igihano kuko nta bundi yigeze akurikiranwa, kandi akaba yari akiri muto kuko yakoze
icyaha afite imyaka 19, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15).
[9] Sibomana Aimable yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa RPAA
00209/2023/CA, iburanisha ribera mu ruhame ku wa 04/11/2025 Sibomana Aimable
yunganiwe na Me Munyaneza Eloi Gentil Diallo naho Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na
Uwanziga Lydia, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[10] Mu myanzuro y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Sibomana Aimable n’umwunganira
bavuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije ibimenyetso bimushinjura, n’amakimbirane yari afitanye
n’abamurega, rumuhamya icyaha nta bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho byemeza ko ari we
wasambanyije uwo mwana.
[11] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite,
kuko ntaho Sibomana Aimable yasabye ko abatangabuhamya be babazwa ngo Urukiko
rubyange, kandi ko atagaragaza ibimenyetso by’amakimbirane avuga ko yari hagati
y’imiryango yombi, ahubwo ko hari ibimenyetso byashingiweho atabashije kuvuguruza
byemeza ko yakoze icyaha akurikiranweho.
[12] Muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ibirebana no kumenya niba Sibomana Aimable
yarahamijwe icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana nta bimenyetso bihamya ku buryo
budashidikanywaho ko ari we wagikoze no kumenya niba harirengagijwe ibimenyetso
bimushinjura.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IBIBAZO BIRI MU RUBANZA
Kumenya niba Sibomana Aimable yarahamijwe icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana nta
bimenyetso bihamya ku buryo budashidikanywaho ko ari we wagikoze, no kumenya niba
harirengagijwe ibimenyetso bimushinjura
[13] Sibomana Aimable n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije kubaza
abatangabuhamya bamushinjura barimo uwitwa Mugisha waje mu iburanisha, n’uwitwa
Gaston utaraje, abo batangabuhamya bakaba bari kwemeza ko birirwanye uwo munsi
bavuga icyaha cyakoreweho (Alibi), kuba batarabajijwe bikaba binyuranyije n’ingingo ya
110 y’Itegeko N°027/2029 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
nshinjabyaha2, bityo ko uburenganzira bwe butubahirijwe, kandi Ubushinjacyaha bufite
inshingano yo gushaka ibimenyetso bishinja n’ibishinjura, iyo nenge nayo ikaba
yazakosorwa n’uru Rukiko, agahabwa uburenganzira bwo kurushyikiriza
abatangabuhamya bamushinjura nk’uko yabisabye urubanza rugitangira.
[14] Ku birebana n’ikimenyetso kimara impaka cya DNA, Sibomana Aimable
n’umwunganira bavuga ko ibimenyetso byakuwe ku mwana byagombaga gupimwa
bigahuzwa n’ibya Sibomana Aimable kugirango hamenyekane uwamusambanyije, kuko
2 Iyo ngingo iteganya ko umucamanza agomba kwakira no gusuzuma ibimenyetso byose ababuranyi batanze
bashinja cyangwa biregura, byo guhamya imvugo yabo.

kuba muganga yarabonye ko akarangabusugi k’uwo mwana kacitse yagombaga no
kugaragaza ko byatewe no gusambanywa, kandi bigahuzwa na Sibomana Aimable, akaba
ari yo mpamvu bavuga ko DNA yagombaga gukorwa hakagaragazwa ko ari we wabikoze,
bityo ibimenyetso byashingiweho bikaba bidahagije, n’ubwo ubu badasaba ko yakorwa
kuko wenda bitashoboka.
[15] Banavuga ko Urukiko rwashingiye ku mvugo z’abatangabuhamya bavuguruzanya
hagati yabo kandi ibyo bavuga barabibwiwe n’umuntu umwe, kuko mu nyandikomvugo
y’ibazwa rya nyina w’umwana yavuze ko umwana yamubwiye ko hari abahungu babiri
barimo Sibomana n’undi atazi izina bamusambanyije undi mutangabuhamya Nyiraguhirwa
we avuga ko umwana yaje avuga Sibomana na Gikuri, bakaba rero badahuza ku byo
umwana yavuze, hakanibazwa impamvu uwo Gikuri ataboneka kandi bigaragara ko
uwamuvuze amuzi neza, ibyo nabyo bikaba ari ikimenyetso kigaragaza ko icyaha aregwa
cyahimbwe.
[16] Ku bijyanye n’ubuhamya bwashingiweho, Sibomana Aimable n’umwunganira
bavuga ko buvuguruzanya n’imvugo z’umwana kandi abatangabuhamya baravuze ibyo
umwana yababwiye, kuko mu iperereza ryakozwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, umwana yavuze ko
uwamuhohoteye amuzi ko yavugiye kuri polisi ko yitwa Sibomana François, ko amazina
ye atari ayazi, aho bivuguruzanya rero akaba ari uko abo batangabuhamya bo bavuga ko
umwana yaje avuga Sibomana nyamara umwana we akavuga ko atari amuzi, ahubwo ko
izina rye yarimenyeye kuri polisi, bakibaza rero uwaba yaragiye kumurega kandi umwana
atari azi izina rye, bakaba kandi badahuriza ku mwirondoro w’uregwa kuko umwana avuga
Sibomana François, aho kuba Sibomana Aimable, ikindi kandi Nyiraguhirwa akaba
yaravuze ko U.N. yaje arira avuga ko Sibomana na Gikuri bamusambanyije, ariko uwo
mwana ntaho yigeze avuga Gikuri, na nyina ntaho yamuvuze.
[17] Sibomana Aimable n’umwunganira bavuga kandi ko Urukiko rutahaye agaciro
amakimbirane yari hagati y’imiryango yabo kandi nyina w’uwo mwana umurega
yarahoraga ashwana na nyirakuru ubarera (we na murumuna we witwa Rukundo),
ikimenyetso kikaba ari uko uwo murumuna we yigeze kumufungisha nawe amuziza
gusambanya U.N., ko rero kuba Urukiko rwarashingiye ku kuba uwo mwana yarasubiye
mu byo yari yaravuze mbere ari inenge ikomeye, kuko atari igitangaza ko umwana wo mu
kigero cye yasubiramo ibyo yashyizwemo n’umubyeyi we, kandi ko n’ubuyobozi
bw’inzego z’ibanze buzi iby’ayo makimbirane, ndetse ko umwana yavuze ko ababyeyi be
n’aba Sibomana bari baziranye bisanzwe, ariko nyina avuga ko abo bantu atabazi, ko rero
icyamuteye guhakana ko baziranye ari uko atashakaga kugaragaza ko bafitanye ikibazo.
[18] Ku bijyanye n’imvugo z’umwana wasambanyijwe, Sibomana Aimable
n’umwunganira banenga ko Urukiko rwazishingiyeho zidashyigikiwe n’ibindi bimenyetso
kandi umwana yari afite imyaka icyenda (9) y’amavuko, kandi na raporo ya muganga ikaba
ishidikanywaho, ko rero izo mvugo zishidikanywaho ku bijyanye n’umwirondoro
w’uwakoze icyaha, no kuba avuga amazina atandukanye n’ayuregwa, kuko yavuze ko
uwamusambanyije yitwa Sibomana François, no kuba yaravuze ko mbere atari azi
Sibomana, bigahamya ko imvugo ze zagombaga gushimangirwa n’ibindi bimenyetso
byemeza ko Sibomana Aimable ariwe wamusambanyije, kandi ko n’ubuhamya bwa
Mujawamaliya na Nyiraguhirwa) ku byerekereye amazina y’uwasambanyije U.N.,

butafatwa nk’ikimenyetso cyunganira ubuhamya bw’uwo mwana, kuko ubuhamya ari
ibivugwa n’umuntu wa bibonye33, kuba rero baravuze ibyo umwana yababwiye, ubuhamya
bwabo bukaba butaragombaga gushingirwaho mu kwemeza ko Sibomana ariwe wabikoze,
ahubwo Ubushinjacyaha bukaba bwaragombaga gushaka ibindi bimenyetso.
[19] Basaba rero ko hashingirwa ku ngingo ya 111 y’Itegeko N° 027/2019 ryo ku wa
19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha, iteganya ko
gushidikanya birengera uregwa no ku rubanza RPAA 00177/2018/CA4 rwemeje ko
Rwagitare Célestin waruregwagamo agizwe umwere nyuma yo gusanga ubuhamya
bumushinja bushidikanywaho kuko bwavuguruzanyaga; hakemezwa ko ubuhamya bwa
nyina w’umwana buvuguruzanya n’ubwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique, ndetse ubuhamya
bwabo bombi bukavuguruzanya n’ubw’uwo mwana, ko nta kimenyetso cyemeza nta shiti
ko Sibomana Aimable ariwe wasambayije uwo mwana.
[20] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire bwa Sibomana
Aimable nta shingiro zifite, kuko ntaho yasabye ko abatangabuhamya be babazwa ngo
Urukiko rwange kubabaza, ko ahubwo umutangabuhamya yamuzanye mu iburanisha
akurikirana urubanza bituma atabazwa, naho uwitwa Gaston avuga akaba ataratanze
umwirondoro yari guhamagazwaho.
[21] Ku birebana na DNA, avuga ko nta bimenyetso byafashwe (samples) byari
gupimwa, ahubwo ko icyo muganga yakoze ari ukureba ko umwana yasambanyijwe kandi
akaba yarabitangiye raporo. Naho ibyo bavuga ko raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko
umwana yasambanyijwe ariko ntigaragaze aho uko gusambanywa guhuriye na Sibomana
Aimable, bitahabwa ishingiro kuko umwana uwo yavuze wamusambanyije ari Sibomana
na muganga amupimye asanga koko yasambanyijwe, uwo witwa Gikuri nawe umwana
akaba yaramuvuze ariko ntiyaboneka ngo akurikiranwe, ko rero impamvu Gikuri
atabajijwe ari uko atigeze aboneka ngo abazwe, bityo ko azakomeza gushakishwa
agafatirwa umwanzuro ukwiye.
[22] Naho ku byo bavuga ko imvugo za nyina w’umwana n’iz’umutangabuhamya witwa
Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique ngo zivuguruzanya, uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko nta
kuvuguruzanya kurimo, kuko uwo Pacifique avuga ko uwo mwana yamubwiye ko yari
yagiye gutashya ahura na Sibomana na Gikuri, naho nyina w’uwo mwana amubajije
amubwira ko ari Sibomana n’undi bamusambanyije, ko rero hasesenguwe izo
nyandikomvugo zabo, bahuriza kuri Sibomana kandi bombi bakavuga abantu babiri, bityo
ko nta kuvuguruzanya kurimo.
[23] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga kandi ko ibyo bavuga ko umwana yavuze
Sibomana François akanavuga ko mbere atari amuzi, kandi yarabwiye abatangabuhamya
ko ari Sibomana, nabyo nta kwivuguruza kurimo kuko kutamenya izina rya kabiri rya
Sibomana bitakwitwa kuvuguruzanya, kandi umwana yakomeje kuvuga uwitwa Sibomana
3 Babishingira ku ngingo ya 62 y’Itegeko 15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza
n’itangwa ryabyo, ryakoreshwaga igihe icyaha cyakorwaga.
4 Rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujure ku wa 21/02/2020, haburana Rwagitera Célestin n’Ubushinjacyaha

kandi bigaragara ko Urukiko rwagiye gukora iperereza nyuma y’imyaka itatu, kuba rero
yaba yaribagiwe irindi zina rye akajijinganya ariko yari yavuze izina rya Sibomana bivuze
ko nta kuvuguruzanya kurimo.
[24] Ku bijyanye n’amakimbirane bavuga ko umuryango wa Sibomana Aimable wari
ufitanye n’uwa U.N., uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko nta shingiro afite, kuko nta
bimenytso batanze bigaragaza ayo makimbirane, bakaba bagomba kuyagaragaza kuko nta
masano bafitanye ku buryo baba bapfa amasambu.
[25] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha asoza avuga ko hari ibimenyetso bigaragaza ko
Sibomana Aimable yasambanyije uwo mwana, kuko ari we umwana avuga ko
yamusambanyije, naho ibyo bavuga ko imvugo y’uwakorewe icyaha idashyigikiwe
n’ibindi bimenyetso nta shingiro bifite kuko hari ibimenyetso biyishyigikiye birimo raporo
ya muganga n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[26] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba Sibomana Aimable
yarahamijwe icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana nta bimenyetso bihamya ku buryo
budashidikanywaho ko ari we wagikoze, no kumenya niba harirengagijwe ibimenyetso
bimushinjura.
[27] Ku byerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza, mu rubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na
Ndayishimiye Jean Damascène, hasesenguwe ingingo ya 119 y’Itegeko N° 15/2004 ryo ku
wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo5, harebwe cyane cyane
ku mwihariko w’imanza nshinjabyaha, maze Urukiko rusobanura ko mu manza
nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri
kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale) ababuranyi bakaba
barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye, kandi ko urukiko arirwo rwemeza ko
ibyo bimenyetso bishobora kwemerwa. Iri hame ryashingiweho mu zindi manza
zakurikiyeho zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, urwaciwe bwa nyuma akaba ari urubanza RPAA
00199/2025/CA, rwaciwe ku wa 30/10/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Umuhire
Udahemuka Régis na Habumugisha Egide.
[28] Kugira ngo Sibomana Aimable ahamwe n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana,
Urukiko Rukuru rwabishingiye ku mvugo za U.N. warasobanuye ibyamubayeho adategwa;
ku mvugo za nyina wavuze ko yagiye gutashya akagaruka arira, akamubwira ko yasanze
Sibomana n’undi muhungu mu ishyamba baragiye ihene bakamusambanya; ku buhamya
bwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique wavuze ko yari iwabo wa U.N. ubwo yazaga arira avuga ko
Sibomana na Gikuri bamusanze mu ishyamba bakamusambanya, bareba ku gitsina cye
bagasanga yakomeretse, no kuri raporo ya muganga yagaragaje ko akarangabusugi ke kari
kacitse (hymen: tear fresh), no mu myanya ndangagitsina hakobotse, runasobanura ko ibyo
Sibomana Aimable yavugaga ko bafite ibyo bapfa n’iwabo w’uwo mwana nta shingiro
5 Iyo ngingo ihura n’ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso

bifite kuko iby’uko bashakaga kubatwara amasambu bitashoboka kubera ko nta masano
bafitanye.
[29] Ku birebana n’ibyo Sibomana Aimable avuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije kubaza
abatangabuhamya bamushinjura, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko
bigaragara ko mu iburanisha ryo ku wa 16/12/2022 mu rubanza rujuririrwa, Sibomana
Aimable yabwiye Urukiko ko yazanye umutangabuhamya ariko rusanga yakurikiranye
iburanisha bituma atabazwa, naho uwo avuga witwa Gaston akaba atarigeze amuvuga ngo
Urukiko rwange kumubaza.
.
[30] Ku bivugwa na Sibomana Aimable ko atari ari aho bavuga ko icyaha cyakorewe
kuko we yari aragiye ihene mu igaraje kandi umwana we akavuga ko yasambanyirijwe mu
ishyamba, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko uwo mwana yabwiye
Urukiko Rukuru mu iperereza rwakoze ko hafi y’aho yasambanyirijwe hari igaraje, bivuze
rero ko aho umwana yavuze hadatandukanye n’aho bari baragiye.
[31] Ku birebana n’uko hatakozwe ikizamini cya DNA cyari kugaragaza aho Sibomana
ahurira n’ibimenyetso muganga yasanze kuri U.N., Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kuba
icyo kizamini kitarakozwe bitatesha agaciro raporo ya muganga kuko inshingano yari
yahawe ari nazo yakoze kwari ugusuzuma uwo mwana, akagaragaza ko hari ibimenyetso
afite bigaragaza ko yasambanyijwe, no kureba niba hari indwara yandujwe, kandi ibyo
raporo yagaragaje bikaba bigomba kureberwa hamwe n’uko ibintu byagenze mbere
y’isuzumwa yakorewe, harimo kuba yaravuze ko yasambanyijwe na Sibomana ari kumwe
n’undi muhungu, amusambanyiriza mu ishyamba aho bari baragiye ihene, bigahura n’uko
Sibomana nawe yavuze ko uwo munsi yirirwanye n’abandi baragiye ihene, kandi aho
avuga ko bari baziragiye akaba ari mu cyerekezo umwana avuga ko yasambanyirijwemo,
n’umutangabuhamya witwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique wari iwabo w’uwo mwana akaba
yaremeje ko yatashye arira ababwira ko yasambanyijwe, barebye babona afite amaraso mu
gitsina kandi habyimbye harimo n’udusebe.
[32] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi nta kuvuguruzanya kuri mu mvugo za U.N.,
iza nyina n’iza Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique, kuko kuba igihe cy’iperereza ry’Urukiko umwana
yaravuze ko yahohotewe n’uwitwa Sibomana François, akanavuga ko mbere atari azi izina
rye, bitavuze ko uwo mwana atari amuzi ahubwo byaba byaratewe n’igihe cyari giciyeho,
cyane cyane ko usibye kwibeshya ku izina rya kabiri atigeze yibeshya ku rya Sibomana,
bivuze rero ko atari undi muntu yavuze, cyangwa ko atari amuzi, kuko kuba yari amuzi
bigaragazwa n’uko mu Bushinjacyaha Sibomana yavuze ko uwo mwana azi izina rye (rya
Sibomana), ko yanacaga iwabo agiye kuragira ihene ndetse ko uwo munsi acyuye ihene
yahanyuze.
[33] Na none ibyo bavuga ko imvugo za U.N. zivuguruzanya n’iz’abatangabuhamya ngo
kuko bo bavuga ko yaje ababwira ko ari Sibomana wamusambanyije, naho umwana we
akavuga ko atari amuzi, ko rero atari kumubabwira atazi izina rye, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga nta kuvuguruzanya kuri mu mvugo zabo kuko nk’uko byavuzwe mu gika
kibanziriza iki, umwana yari azi ko uwamusambanyije yitwa Sibomana, aba ari nawe
abwira nyina n’umutangabuhamya witwa Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique, ibyo rero bavuga ko

atari azi amazina ye bikaba nta shingiro bifite, cyane cyane ko hari n’aho Sibomana yavuze
ko uwo mwana yigeze kumutuka akabwira nyina ko azamukubita, bikaba byumvikanisha
ko bari basanzwe baziranye.
[34] Ku birebana n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya, Sibomana n’umwunganira bavuga ko
nazo zivuguruzanya, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko kuba nyina
wa U.N. yaravuze ko uyu yamubwiye ko yasambanyijwe n’abahungu babari barimo
Sibomana n’undi bari kumwe, naho Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique we akavuga ko umwana
yavuze ko yasambanyijwe na Sibomana na Gikuri, bitakwitwa ko izo mvugo
zivuguruzanya, kuko icyo zihuriyeho kandi kigize ireme ry’ubuhamya bwabo ari uko
umwana yababwiye abantu babiri, kandi muri bo hakaba harimo izina rya Sibomana.
[35] Ku bivugwa na Sibomana n’umwunganira ko hashingiwe ku mvugo z’umwana
wasambanyijwe zidashyigikiwe n’ibindi bimenyetso, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga
nabyo nta shingiro bifite, kuko mu kumuhamya icyaha hatashingiwe ku mvugo z’uwo
mwana gusa ahubwo zahujwe n’ibindi bimenyetso birimo cyane cyane raporo ya muganga
yagaragaje ko yari afite ibimenyetso by’uko yasambanyijwe bigaragazwa n’uko
akarangabusugi ke kari kacitse (hymen: tear fresh), no kuba ku gitsina hari hakobotse,
hakaba n’imvugo za nyina hamwe n’iza Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique wasobanuye uburyo
umwana yageze mu rugo arira akababwira ko yasambanyijwe, akavuga
n’abamusambanyije.
[36] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi kuba nyina w’umwana ndetse na
Nyiraguhirwa Pacifique baravuze ibyo babwiwe na U.N. bitabuza ko imvugo zabo
zishingirwaho, cyane cyane ko zitashingiweho nk’iz’ababonye icyaha gikorwa ahubwo
zashingiweho nk’izababonye uwo mwana wari wagiye gutashya agarutse arira avuga ko
yasambanyijwe, akavuga n’abamusambanyije, kandi bikemezwa na raporo ya muganga.
[37] Byongeye kandi, mu rwego rwo gushaka ukuri kw’ibyabaye ku birebana
n’imikorere y’icyaha, hadashingirwa gusa ku buhamya bw’ababonye icyaha gikorwa kuko
akenshi ibyaha bikorerwa mu bwihisho, ahubwo hashobora no gushingirwa ku buhamya
bushingiye ku mabwire (preuve par ouï-dire) cyangwa ubuhamya buziguye (preuve
indirecte) iyo bushyigikiwe n’ibindi bimenyetso bituma bwizerwa nk’uko byatanzweho
umurongo n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza RPA/Gén 00002/2018/CA rwaciwe ku wa
27/07/2023 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Twahirwa François6; bityo kuba nyina wa U.N na
Nyiraguhirwa baravuze ko babonye umwana wari wagiye gutashya yarabagezeho arira,
akavuga ko Sibomana n’undi muhungu yasanze baragiye ihene bamusambanyije,
Sibomana nawe akaba yemera ko uwo munsi yari aragiye ihene muri ako gace umwana
avuga ko yasambanyirijwemo, raporo ya muganga nayo ikagaragaza ko yari afite
ibimenyetso bya vuba byo gusambanywa, ibyo bimenyetso bituma ubuhamya bwabo
bwizerwa.
6 Uwo murongo ukaba waranakurikijwe mu zindi manza zaciwe uruheruka akaba ari urubanza RPAA
00056/2023/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 29/09/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Uwanyagasani
Vedaste (igika cya 25).

[38] Naho ku bijyanye n’amakimbirane Sibomana Aimable avuga ko ariyo yabaye
intandaro yo kuregwa, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga bitahabwa agaciro, kuko abazwa
mu Bugenzacyaha no mu Bushinjacyaha yavuze ko ntacyo apfa n’umuryango wa U.N.,
naho aburana ku ifungwa ry’agateganyo avuga ko yigeze kugirana ikibazo n’uwo mwana
yamututse abwira nyina ko azamukubita, agakeka ko ari yo mpamvu amubeshyera, agaze
mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye avuga ko amakimbirane ayafitanye na nyina w’uwo mwana naho
mu Rukiko Rukuru avuga ko U.N. ari mushiki we kuko nyina ari muka se, akaba
yarashakaga kubarira imitungo. Kuba rero yaragiye ahindagura impamvu z’ibyo bapfa,
ndetse mu nzego z’ikurikiranacyaha akabanza kuvuga ko ntacyo bapfa, byumvikanisha ko
iby’amakimbirane avuga ari uburyo bwo gushaka kwikuraho icyaha.
[39] Na none kandi, ibivugwa na Sibomana ko nyina wa U.N. yigeze kubeshyera
murumuna we ko yasambanyije uwo mwana, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga
bitashingirwaho ngo hemezwe ko abeshyerwa, kuko uretse kuba nta kigaragaza ko
byabayeho, no kuba murumuna we yaba yarakurikiranwe ku cyaha yari yaketsweho,
bitabuza ko nawe akurikiranwa mu gihe hari ibimenyetso bigaragaza ko yakoze icyaha.
[40] Naho ku bisabwa na Sibomana Aimable ko hahamagazwa abatangabuhamya
bamushinjura, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga atari ngombwa gutumiza
abatangabuhamya muri uru rubanza kuko ibimenyetso byashingiweho ahamwa n’icyaha
bihagije nk’uko byatanzweho umurongo n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga, uvuga ko Urukiko
rudategetswe kubaza abatangabuhamya igihe cyose bisabwe n’umuburanyi iyo rwumva
ibimenyetso rwashyikirijwe bihagije7, ndetse n’urubanza RPAA00177/2018/CA Sibomana
n’umwunganira baburanisha rukaba rutashingirwaho, kuko ubuhamya bwashingiweho mu
kumuhamya icyaha budashidikanywaho kubera ko butavuguruzanya.
[41] Hashingiwe ku byagaragajwe byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibimenyetso
byashingiweho bihamya ku buryo budashidikanywa ko Sibomana Aimable yakoze icyaha
akurikiranweho kandi ko nta bimenyetso bimushinjura byirengagijwe, bityo hakaba
hagumyeho imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’ URUKIKO
[42] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Sibomana Aimable nta shingiro bufite;
[43] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 01901/2019/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru ku
wa 13/01/2023 rugumanye agaciro mu ngingo zarwo zose;
[44] Rutegetse ko igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) Sibomana Aimable
yahanishijwe ku cyaha cyo gusambanya umwana kigumyeho.
7Reba urubanza RPAA 010/09/CS rwaciwe ku wa 09/03/2012 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nzajyibwami
Emmanuel, igika cya 9
